# Kaung Htun Thant

> Personal portfolio of Kaung Htun Thant, a Full Stack Developer with ~7 years of experience building production web apps for startups in Myanmar and the UAE. Specializes in the Laravel / Vue ecosystem and AWS infrastructure, owning projects end to end: database design, API architecture, infrastructure, and deployment.

Currently a Senior Fullstack Developer at Nokta Software Development (UAE). Offers web design, web development, and performance optimization services.

## Projects

- [Nokta CRM + EMR](https://www.khthant.com/#projects): Custom CRM + EMR platform (Laravel, Vue.js, AWS) that replaced Bitrix and serves ~60 simultaneous sales, admin, and clinic staff across the UAE and Turkey. Led end-to-end as project lead and business analyst.
- [iDiamond E-commerce](https://idiamond.ae): E-commerce backend (Laravel, AWS S3) with payment logic for 5 methods including Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, and Google Pay.
- [Event Management System](https://www.khthant.com/#projects): Myanmar's first event management system (Laravel, MySQL), deployed at major expos handling 10,000+ attendees per day with QR-coded entry passes and instant card printing.
- [School Management System](https://www.khthant.com/#projects): Complete school management system (Laravel, Azure AD SSO) onboarding 1,000+ students per term, with automated QR ID cards and an incident management system.
